scripts.audit:high: npm run audit:server:high && npm run audit:client:high
scripts.ci:no-tests: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client && npm run build:client:web-smoke && (npm run audit:high || node -e "console.warn('audit:high reported known vulnerabilities; review npm audit output')")
scripts.ci: npm run lint:server && npm run test:server:coverage && npm run lint:client && npm run test:client && npm run build:client:web-smoke
